title: rubus parkeri
intro: Rubus parkeri, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus parkeri include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Rubus parkeri is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in the production of jams and other food products.
